sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50416" key="i(mantelikth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱμαντ-ελικτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἑλίσσω</etym>) <sense id="n50416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pricker of tapes</tr_> (cf. foreg.): metaph., '<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thimble-rigger</tr_>', of sophists, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">150</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
